case_title: MANIK BAHL VS. BAY 1 FITNESS #1, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAHL, MANIK AS TO DEFENDANT BAY 1 FITNESS #1, INC. A FLORIDA CORPORATION BAY 1 FITNESS #2, INC. A FLORIDA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
